data.content:
Implementation landed on branch worktree-agent-a4d38db5 (4 commits: 2b132a4c refactor, 40fc31d3 backend, 01f210a2 ui, 5b4014bc tests).

What changed:
- withWildcardTerminals gone; toDescriptor returns transitions verbatim from the kno profile.
- { from: "*", to: "shipped" } removed from canonicalTransitions() in src/lib/workflows.ts.
- applyStateToPatch no longer auto-forces — generic update({ state }) sends status with no force; kno arbitrates.
- New descriptive correction path: BackendPort.markTerminal + reopen; new POST /api/beats/[id]/mark-terminal and /reopen routes; WorkflowCorrectionFailureError emits a red banner with the greppable marker FOOLERY WORKFLOW CORRECTION FAILURE on non-terminal targets or unknown profiles. Banner lives in src/lib/workflow-correction-failure.ts.
- close() on every backend (Knots/Beads/BdCli/Stub/Mock) now delegates to markTerminal.
- UI: bulk terminal jumps and per-row state-dropdown terminal jumps route through markTerminalOrThrow; beat-detail adds a Correction submenu enumerating the descriptor's terminalStates. Retake uses reopenBeat (descriptive correction) instead of smuggling state: ready_for_implementation through update.
- Test deltas: deleted knots-backend-workflows-wildcard.test.ts + workflow-ship-wildcard.test.ts; adjusted valid-next-states, beat-columns-valid-next-states, knots-backend-state, knots-backend-contract-parity, retake-lightbox-contract, use-bulk-actions-ship-guard. Added: knots-backend-workflows-honest, knots-backend-mark-terminal, backends-mark-terminal-parity, mark-terminal-route.

Quality gates: bun run lint clean; bunx tsc --noEmit clean; bun run test — 2723 passing (was 2708 at baseline; delta: +22 new, -7 deleted).

Surprise / latent reliance surfaced in step 7:
- src/lib/doctor-fixes.ts fixStaleParent calls getBackend().update(beatId, { state: "in_progress" }) for a non-terminal jump. Previously worked on knots only because of the removed auto-force. It is now expected to fail loudly on knots repos (in_progress is not a kno profile state). Not touched per plan instruction 'never reintroduce the auto-force'; this is a pre-existing beads-compat path that warrants a follow-up.
- retake was the main surfaced reliance (shipped -> ready_for_implementation is non-adjacent in every kno profile). Fixed by adding a dedicated reopen() method rather than re-legitimizing auto-force.

Manual verification vector for the banner: POST /api/beats/<id>/mark-terminal with targetState=implementation (non-terminal) against any beat returns HTTP 400 and logs the FOOLERY WORKFLOW CORRECTION FAILURE red banner to server stderr. Same marker fires from markTerminal called on a profile it cannot resolve.

Next step (implementation_review) is a separate claim.
